feed.title: RNS Lab - Radio Navigation and Sensing Laboratory
feed.subtitle: Department of Aeronautical and Aviation Engineering The Hong Kong Polytechnic University

entry.title: Our inter-departmental final year project group successfully complete the project exhibition and final presentation

link.title: Our inter-departmental final year project group successfully complete the project exhibition and final presentation

entry.content: In June 2025, Jiayi Zhou (Louise), Qing Lin Tan (Giselle), Sahat Mahmud, and Sashenka Gamage establish a team for the Inter-departmental final year project (funded by FENG), to conduct the research topic of “Intelligent UAV Systems for GNSS-Based Remote Sensing on Vegetation”. Through nine months of explorations, they achieve fruitful results on using the UAV to capture GNSS observations from ground reflections to detect ground features like water, vegetation, etc.

entry.title: Our PhD student Yilin presents her research at the European Navigation Conference 2026

link.title: Our PhD student Yilin presents her research at the European Navigation Conference 2026

entry.content: Ms Yilin Fan attends the European Navigation Conference (ENC) 2026 in Vienna, Austria, and presents her research entitled “Enhancing Urban GNSS Measurement Accuracy: A Statistical 3D Mapping Aided NLOS Error Correction Framework”. This study extends 3D mapping aided (3DMA) GNSS by a statistical process to estimate the corrections for non-line-of-sight reception errors in urban areas.
